Stages.Name: CandidateAggregator
Stages.Action: Collects UnifiedCandidates from all sources (vector, memory, graph, keyword)

Stages.Name: StrategySelector
Stages.Action: Selects scoring strategy based on query context (intent, domain, memory pressure, token budget)

Stages.Name: UnifiedCandidateScorer
Stages.Action: Scores each candidate using strategy's feature weights

Stages.Name: LifecycleFilter
Stages.Action: Applies lifecycle penalties per strategy's LifecyclePenaltyFactor

LlmBoundary.Description: LLM is restricted to advisory role. Strategy selection may accept LLM suggestion as input, but the final decision is deterministic via StrategySelector.
